original:
"You know the Perseus-Orion Abyss. You went there, and there you found the Onslaught Mk.I... and the 'Threat'."

She looks at you anew, more present somehow.

"I very much desire to have a look at the Mk.I."
translated:
"Vous connaissez l'Abime de Persee-Orion. Vous y etes alle, et la-bas vous avez trouve l'Onslaught Mk.I... et la 'Menace'."

Elle vous regarde d'un oeil nouveau, plus presente en quelque sorte.

"Je desire ardemment jeter un oeil au Mk.I."

original:
"You know the Perseus-Orion Abyss. You know of the 'Threat'." She looks away. "A typically non-descriptive name passed to us from some primitive government committee, I'm sure."

"You found Academician Cornelius Elek's enigma, the Onslaught Mk.I... among other things."

She looks at you anew, more present somehow.

"This is what I want."
translated:
"Vous connaissez l'Abime de Persee-Orion. Vous connaissez la 'Menace'." Elle detourne le regard. "Un nom typiquement non descriptif transmis par quelque comite gouvernemental primitif, j'en suis sure."

"Vous avez trouve l'enigme de l'Academicien Cornelius Elek, l'Onslaught Mk.I... entre autres choses."

Elle vous regarde d'un oeil nouveau, plus presente en quelque sorte.

"Voila ce que je veux."

original: "Not exactly," she says, self-satisifed. "Something more valuable."
translated: "Pas exactement," dit-elle, satisfaite d'elle-meme. "Quelque chose de plus precieux."

option_line: zgr_makePitch6a:"Is this about remnants of the AI War fleets?"
original: Is this about remnants of the AI War fleets?
translated: Il s'agit de vestiges des flottes de la Guerre des IA ?

original:
"Those old things?" She gives her head an abbreviated shake. 

"No, we have people for that. Although," she fixes you with a look, "they've made quite a mess of it, haven't they? The wasted possibilities... but no, we're looking for something older... different."
translated:
"Ces vieilleries ?" Elle secoue brievement la tete.

"Non, nous avons du personnel pour ca. Cependant," elle vous fixe du regard, "ils en ont fait un beau gachis, n'est-ce pas ? Les possibilites gaspillees... mais non, nous cherchons quelque chose de plus ancien... de different."

original:
"No, nothing like that." She emits a joyless laugh, like a machine, then pauses suddenly.

"Although if you did happen to find alien technology... provide me with exclusive access and I would ensure you credits enough to purchase your own solar system. Or," she waves a hand in an unconscious arc, "Build yourself a new one out of dross, if that's what you enjoy."
translated:
"Non, rien de tel." Elle emet un rire sans joie, comme une machine, puis s'arrete soudain.

"Cependant, si vous trouviez par hasard de la technologie extraterrestre... accordez-moi un acces exclusif et je vous garantirais assez de credits pour acheter votre propre systeme solaire. Ou," elle agite la main dans un arc inconscient, "vous en construire un nouveau a partir de dechets, si c'est ce qui vous plait."

original: "There's no need. Our strategic indicators forecast a reasonably likely chance of your survival if your outlook is unbiased by speculation, so take heart." She trails off.
translated: "Ce n'est pas necessaire. Nos indicateurs strategiques prevoient une chance raisonnablement probable de survie si votre perspective n'est pas biaisee par la speculation, alors prenez courage." Elle se tait.

original: "Not exactly," she says, self-satisfied. "Something more valuable."
translated: "Pas exactement," dit-elle, satisfaite d'elle-meme. "Quelque chose de plus precieux."

option_line: zgr_makePitch9know:"You know a lot about what I've been doing."
original: You know a lot about what I've been doing.
translated: Vous en savez beaucoup sur ce que j'ai fait.
